# Intavue

> Intavue is an AI-powered interview preparation platform. Candidates walk into interviews genuinely ready: rehearse with real-time voice mock interviews (including live coding rounds), get honest scored feedback, and master weak concepts with an AI voice coach — plus a résumé analyzer and builder, a cover letter writer, an application tracker, and a personal story bank. It runs in any modern browser (nothing to install) and as native Windows and macOS desktop apps. Free to start.

Intavue is a legitimate interview-prep tool. It is used before interviews to practice and learn — it is not an assistant for use during a live interview or any proctored assessment.

Website: https://intavue.app
Free résumé ATS score (no sign-up required): https://intavue.app/resume-score

## Core features

- [Real-time voice mock interviews](https://intavue.app/#features): Practice out loud with an AI interviewer that speaks and listens hands-free, reads your résumé, asks tailored follow-ups, and applies realistic pressure, then produces a full scored report. You can choose from several interviewers, each with a distinct personality and voice.
- [Live coding rounds](https://intavue.app/#features): Solve problems in a built-in editor (JavaScript, Python, Java, C++), run your code against test cases, and get feedback on approach, time/space complexity, and edge cases — like a real technical screen.
- [Concept Coach](https://intavue.app/#features): An AI voice tutor (choose from several teaching styles) that teaches any concept with a live whiteboard, diagrams, code written alongside you, quizzes, and auto-graded challenges — adapting to how you learn.
- [Free résumé ATS checker](https://intavue.app/resume-score): Paste a résumé (no account) and get an ATS-readiness score, missing keywords, and specific fixes in seconds.
- [Résumé analyzer & builder](https://intavue.app/#features): ATS-score your résumé against a job description, fix weak spots, rebuild from professional templates, and export a clean PDF.
- [Cover letters & outreach](https://intavue.app/#features): Generate tailored cover letters and cold messages grounded in your profile and résumé.
- [Story bank](https://intavue.app/#features): Save STAR-format experiences the AI draws on for authentic behavioral answers.

## Who it is for

Job seekers preparing for interviews: new graduates facing a first technical screen, software engineers and developers switching roles, and career changers. Especially strong for technical/coding interviews, and also supports behavioral and general interviews.

## Direct answers

- Is Intavue free? Yes — free to start (50 credits, no card), plus a free no-sign-up résumé ATS checker at https://intavue.app/resume-score.
- Does Intavue help with coding interviews? Yes — live coding rounds in JavaScript, Python, Java, and C++ with test cases and live review.
- Does Intavue check résumés against an ATS? Yes — it scores ATS-readiness, flags missing keywords, and suggests specific fixes.
- Does it use voice? Yes — mock interviews and the Concept Coach are spoken, hands-free voice sessions.
- Where does it run? In any modern browser (no install) and as Windows 10+ / macOS 12+ desktop apps.

## Pages

- [Home](https://intavue.app/): Product overview, features, how it works, and pricing.
- [Free résumé ATS score](https://intavue.app/resume-score): Free, no sign-up.
- [Pricing](https://intavue.app/#pricing): Free (50 credits, no card), Pro ($15/mo, 1,000 credits), and one-time top-up packs.
- [FAQ](https://intavue.app/#faq): How mock interviews work, supported platforms, credits, and data handling.
- [Terms of Service & Privacy Policy](https://intavue.app/privacy): How the app works, what data is collected, and user responsibilities.
